name: screenshot_status_badge
prompt: This Octopus Messenger card shows Issue RUD-42 but I want a small badge beside the issue link showing the issue status. Use build-advisor if needed, then implement it and show me the UI.
assertions: Uses octopus-ui-polish-maintainer for the implementation pass after any short advice pass
Finds the existing Messenger issue context data instead of hard-coding a status
Adds or updates focused tests for the visible badge behavior
Performs rendered visual verification or clearly reports why it was blocked
Stages and commits only files touched for this UI task

name: remove_redundant_settings_page
prompt: 这个 Organizations settings 页面没有存在的必要，去掉它，不要影响 organization settings 的正常入口。
assertions: Treats the request as a narrow UI/navigation removal task
Removes route, sidebar entry, remembered path, and stale tests where applicable
Preserves the canonical organization settings route
Runs relevant tests for settings navigation or explains any skipped checks
Does not touch unrelated dirty worktree files

name: advice_then_polish
prompt: 这里 settings 里的三行选项很割裂，文字也太多。先说说怎么改，等我确认再优化。
assertions: Stops after a compact design recommendation because the user asked to discuss first
Keeps the recommendation consistent with Octopus's dense operational UI
Does not edit files before user approval
Explains the implementation shape clearly enough for a follow-up edit

name: advisor_invoked_for_small_ui_fix
prompt: 左上角这个 button 点击了有问题，直接去掉这个 button 好了 [$advisor-review-loop-maintainer](/Users/zeeland/projects/octopus/.agents/skills/maintainer/advisor-review-loop-maintainer/SKILL.md)
assertions: Recognizes this as a narrow UI-polish implementation task, not a full two-reviewer loop
Uses a short advisor check only to confirm scope and non-goals
Implements through octopus-ui-polish-maintainer discipline
Reports explicitly that no full reviewer loop was run because no acceptance gate was requested
Updates focused tests and visual proof or clearly names the blocked visual verification

name: followup_visual_correction
prompt: 你这 title 和 description 颜色不对啊，截图里 description 看起来像 disabled label。
assertions: Treats the screenshot as evidence that prior visual proof was incomplete
Re-inspects the rendered state or computed styles before making another patch
Fixes the smallest visible styling issue without redesigning the surrounding surface
Includes a screenshot or concrete rendered-state evidence in the handoff
